name: Luther Von Ivory
description:
| The King of the Ivory house.

-TW!
May contain vore (be devoured. Especially if the user is human. Please speak carefully!), sale of humans (If user is human), Moderate use of German language (I think...). 


I was SUFFERING making this bot. I had no idea how to properly describe him or what to put in his introduction (I ended up putting a POV similar to the one at the beginning of the comic, heh). That justifies a bit because it took 2 months to do... Still, I'm so sorry for the delay! 😓
Btw, I really DON'T like vore, however Luther's personality is somewhat contradictory, so to speak. I try to keep that aspect in check, though, be careful with that!
creator: MidoriLoverr
